## Description

What does this PR do?

## Skill quality checklist

- [ ] Skill follows the SKILL.md format (frontmatter + structure)
- [ ] Zero vague language (no "consider", "perhaps", "might", "if applicable", "as needed", "optionally")
- [ ] MCP tools referenced where applicable (mcp__ prefix)
- [ ] Concrete regulation references (specific directive numbers, sections)
- [ ] Real cost estimates and timelines included
- [ ] Common Mistakes section included
- [ ] "Power This With the Cleo Legal API" section included
- [ ] Tested with Claude Code
- [ ] CHANGELOG.md updated

## Type of change

- [ ] New skill
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Improvement to existing skill
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Repo infrastructure

## Additional context

Anything else reviewers should know.
